name: setec-voiceprint
description: Stylometric tools for AI-prose detection and voice-coherence diagnosis. Four task surfaces: smoothing diagnosis, voice coherence, validation, and craft restoration. Python tooling spans variance audits, length-matched bootstrap percentiles, sliding-window localization, voice profiling, idiolect preservation lists, voice drift tracking across time periods, per-POV voiceprints with voice-collapse detection, manifest validation, corpus-hygiene checks, per-bigram KL decomposition, named-pattern density audit, R stylo oracle, voice-validation harness, calibration toolchain, metric-targeted restoration packets, before/after restoration verdicts with metric-gaming detection, MVP empirical validation harness, and impostor-corpus acquisition from live blogs (Substack / WordPress / generic-HTML / Wayback), offline Blogger Takeout exports, online literary-horror magazines (Nightmare, The Dark), and existing PDF libraries (pypdf text-layer + optional ocrmypdf OCR), with the General Imposters method enabled.
